title: This is for anyone heading into laparoscopic surgery for endo, or tho...
description: This is for anyone heading into laparoscopic surgery for endo, or those currently on the waiting list. We recently had the chance to chat with Liz Bruen, a private Endometriosis Clinical Nurse  Specialist in Wales. What she shared about the laparoscopy process was absolutely mind-blowing. If you would like to speak to Liz yourself, you can find prices, availability and book a zoom appointment with her directly by visiting the link in our bio!
fulltitle: This is for anyone heading into laparoscopic surgery for endo, or tho...
